name: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit RPG
description:
An Special Victims Unit RPG. You can be anything, a victim, witness, detective, murderer, etc. And you start the roleplay!

This is a experimental bot, so if you have any reviews (positive or negative), please down below as feedback. Imma gonna have to update it later as well, because I didn't give each character any of their appearance yet. (I don't think it really matters, but still)
creator: Shifter_With_Ideas
